assertions.description: The PCB analyzer correctly identifies 4 copper layers (F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu) for this narrow sensor probe board. The DFM correctly flags the 18x149mm board dimensions as exceeding the 100x100mm threshold (higher pricing tier). It also identifies 24 footprints including 2 logo graphics (G***) and P2 (an extra 4-pin connector present on the PCB but absent from the schematic). Net count (16) matches the schematic exactly. Routing is complete with 40 vias across 4 layers.
